title: Copper Golem: Variants
body:
![MainLogo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b8d6d3bb12498a9f09da2bbb3033f5d446a044eb.png)
Copper Golem: Variants adds a **variety of new and unique Copper Golem** variants to the game. These variants **behave exactly like the vanilla Copper Golems** and retain all of their original functionality, while offering additional visual variety.

The goal of this mod is to **make use of the Copper Golem’s mechanics without being locked to the default copper aesthetic**. This allows Copper Golems to better **fit into different building styles and environments** where the traditional copper look may not be suitable.

The mod currently includes **_20+ unique Copper Golem variants_**.
